Sidqly is a premium global Islamic operating platform for verified giving, manual payment review, proof approval, and dignity-safe impact updates. We help organizations manage Zakat, Qurbani, Ramadan, and community aid with board-ready reporting.

# Main Product Categories / Features
- Verified Giving & Donation Operations
- Manual Payment Verification Workflows
- Proof Trust Engine (Dignity-safe face blurring, approval queues)
- Board-Ready Reporting Dashboard
- Fund Separation (Zakat vs Sadaqah)

# Use Cases
- Mosques
- Islamic Charities
- Zakat Committees
- Qurbani Organizers
- Sadaqah Campaign Teams
